title: NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Asia Pacific Associates:
NIIT Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Asia Pacific Associates!
